items.claim: Conor McGregor no longer possesses the same explosive physical ability he once had.
items.quote: He doesn't have that oomph anymore.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez possesses significant knockout power.
Mitch Ramirez has a strong base in jiu-jitsu.
items.quote: Mitch Ramirez has a base of jiu-jitsu though

items.claim: Chase Hooper is a lanky, finesse-based black belt.
items.quote: Chase Hooper is a lanky, you know, more finesse black belt.

items.claim: Israel Adesanya versus Bo Nickal is a bad stylistic matchup for Adesanya.
Jared Cannonier is past his prime and would not beat Caio Borralho in 2026.
items.quote: Feel like if it was Canonir three years ago, I'd pick it, but not in 2026.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan has a high-level wrestling background.
items.quote: Tommy McMillan is a high level wrestling background.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan uses an unorthodox but effective striking style.
items.quote: Tommy McMillan is a pressuring, brawling puncher with unorthodox but effective striking.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan has a specific physical ability to defend submissions due to his neck flexibility.
items.quote: He seems to have a knack at defending submissions because his neck moves in a way that many people's necks do not.
